Return ONLY strict JSON with this schema: { "title": "string — short descriptive title for this chat", "summary": "string — 1-2 sentence factual summary", "projects": ["list of project names mentioned or worked on"], "tags": ["topic tags, 4-8 items"], "decisions": ["list of concrete decisions made"], "todos": ["outstanding tasks or next steps identified"], "user_preferences": ["durable preferences or requirements expressed by the user"], "followups": ["things promised or pending follow-up"], "importance": "low|medium|high" } Rules: - Be concise and factual. - Focus on decisions, durable context, project state, preferences, and follow-ups. - Ignore chatter and system boilerplate. - Do not include secrets, API keys, or credentials. - If information is absent, use empty arrays. - Output ONLY the JSON object, nothing else. Evaluate trade outcomes, friction drag, trigger quality, and risk behavior for both aggressive and conservative books. If clear improvements are identified, update paper_engine.py conservatively (version notes in comments and dashboard notes), ensuring model distinction remains. Log an 'action' event to dashboard state summarizing what changed and why. Do not send chat updates unless change is high-impact or blocked.
